subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are turned towards God! Days pass by, afflictions fade away, and every tribulation is in the path of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو متوجه الی الله ایامی میگذرد آلامی در گذر است هر محنتی در سبیل حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
